since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.23% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.55%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.55%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.24%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.24%, OKLO +5.39%, OKLO +5.39%, NOW +4.25%, CHKP +2.98%. Laggards: NXPI -3.83%, MU -3.72%, MRVL -2.65%, CRNC -2.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.64% at $175.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
